subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue Lauriston 97 in Paris, 1913-03-21
subcodes.first_line: I pray that this Fete [Naw-Ruz] be blessed to all the friends in America! May each one of them become a mighty teacher... When I was in Bagdad I had a coat
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
